lacrima_trigger.title: Obtain Lacrima (cataclysm:lacrima) from the Netherite Monstrosity — this triggers the Infernal Age transition

infernal_recipe.title: Craft your first Infernal-tier item — check JEI for recipes unlocked after the Infernal Age transition

subtitle.text: Lacrima in hand. The age turns. The Nether did not name itself the Infernal — you did. Enter accordingly.

description: CH.12 · THE INFERNAL AGE
▸ Lacrima from the Netherite Monstrosity
is the Infernal Age trigger.
Obtaining it shifts the History Stages age system.
New recipes unlock. New materials become craftable.
The Infernal Age is the Nether's answer
to the nuclear age you built in Ch10.
◈ INFERNAL AGE TRANSITION
└ Trigger: obtain cataclysm:lacrima
(from Netherite Monstrosity in Nether depths)
└ Transition is PERMANENT — no undo
└ New JEI recipes become visible after transition
└ Check JEI immediately after obtaining Lacrima
to see all unlocked Infernal recipes
└ Age announcement: History Stages will display
the age change notification in chat
◈ LACRIMA MATERIAL USES
└ Infernal crafting recipes: Lacrima as ingredient
└ Likely uses: Infernal tools/weapons, Cataclysm gear
upgrade paths, advanced Ch12 construction materials
└ cataclysm:lacrima is also likely needed for Ch13+
gear preparation — stockpile before advancing
└ Farm 8+ Lacrima from Monstrosity before Ch13
◈ INFERNAL AGE CONTENT
└ Age-gated content: check KubeJS age_lock.js or
historystages config for full Infernal unlock list
└ The Infernal Age is the last age before divine
(Path to Divinity is the final transition)
└ Some Celestisynth recipes become accessible
only after the Infernal Age transition
▸ The Lacrima is the Nether's tear.
The Nether cried once.
It cried for the thing it lost
when the Monstrosity was killed.
The tear solidified into a material.
You are holding it now.
Use it accordingly.
▶ Obtain Lacrima and trigger the Infernal Age [check]
▶ Craft your first Infernal-tier item [check]
◇ Do not trigger the Infernal Age until you
have completed all Ch11 Cataclysm bosses.
The Monstrosity is the LAST kill in Ch11.
Trigger the age only when ready to build Ch12.
